block.name: openclaw_hook.py: 3 targeted bug fixes — ingest error path, checkpoint config re-apply, tonic gate
block.scope: Faux_Clawdbot openclaw_hook.py — three independent bugs. (A) ingestor.ingest() inside _concurrent_lock has no try/except — result is unbound if ingest throws, causing NameError at nodes_created. (B) graph.restore() loads checkpoint config without re-applying snn_config — stale checkpoint values overwrite code defaults on every restart. (C) Unexpected TonicEngine init Exception silently swallowed at logger.info — _tonic_thread left in half-configured state.
acceptance_criteria: ingestor.ingest() wrapped in try/except inside _concurrent_lock; result=None on exception; logger.warning logs the exception
Early-return guard added before nodes_created: if result is None: return {status: error, reason: ingest_failed, message_count: self._message_count}
self.graph.config.update(snn_config) added immediately after the restore logger.info line, inside the try block
logger.warning used for unexpected tonic engine init error (was logger.info); self._tonic_thread = None added after the warning
python3 -c non-comment line count for 'Ingest error:' outputs 1
python3 -c count of 'if result is None:' outputs 1
python3 -c non-comment line count for logger.warning + 'Tonic engine init error' on same line outputs 1

outputs.name: openclaw_hook.py
outputs.contract: Bug A ingest try/except + None return guard; Bug B config.update after restore; Bug C logger.warning + _tonic_thread=None; changelog entry prepended

never: Do not modify any vendored file: ng_lite.py, ng_peer_bridge.py, ng_tract_bridge.py, ng_ecosystem.py, openclaw_adapter.py, ng_autonomic.py, ng_embed.py
Do not use sed or awk on source files — use edit_file only
Do not change CES, River, or BrainSwitcher logic — targeted edits to on_message() and __init__ restore/tonic blocks only
anti_drift: Bug A: try/except wraps only the ingestor.ingest() call inside the lock — the step_result = self.graph.step() line remains outside and after the try block
Bug B: self.graph.config.update(snn_config) goes inside the try block, immediately after the logger.info restore log, before the except clause
Bug C: change logger.info to logger.warning for the 'Tonic engine init error' line only; add self._tonic_thread = None on the very next line; do not clear any other state
Changelog entry prepended at top of existing changelog block; anchor is the 2026-04-20 BLK-NG-193 line

params.command: python3 -c "import os; t=os.environ.get('GITHUB_TOKEN',''); print('TOKEN_OK' if t else 'TOKEN_MISSING')"

steps.description: Remove stale Faux_Clawdbot clone from any previous run
Prepend changelog entry for the three fixes at top of existing changelog block

params.old_text: # [2026-04-20] Codemine (BLK-NG-193) — Wire SimpleVectorDB persistence into save/load
params.new_text:
# [2026-04-26] Codemine (BLK-FC-215) — Three targeted bug fixes
# What: (A) on_message() wraps ingestor.ingest() in try/except; result=None on failure; return dict gated.
#        (B) graph.config.update(snn_config) re-applied after restore() so checkpoint cannot overwrite code defaults.
#        (C) Unexpected TonicEngine init Exception escalated to logger.warning; _tonic_thread cleared to None.
# Why:  (A) Unbound NameError on result.nodes_created if ingest throws inside the concurrent lock.
#        (B) Pre-tuning config values bleed in from checkpoint on every container restart.
#        (C) Unexpected engine failures were silently swallowed at info level, leaving half-configured tonic state.
# How:  Targeted edits only. Intentional scope differences (no CES, no River, no BrainSwitcher) preserved.
# [2026-04-20] Codemine (BLK-NG-193) — Wire SimpleVectorDB persistence into save/load

steps.description: Bug A: wrap ingestor.ingest() in try/except inside the concurrent lock so result is never unbound

params.old_text:
with self.graph._concurrent_lock:
            result = self.ingestor.ingest(text, source_type=source_type)

            # Run SNN learning step
            step_result = self.graph.step()
params.new_text:
with self.graph._concurrent_lock:
            try:
                result = self.ingestor.ingest(text, source_type=source_type)
            except Exception as exc:
                logger.warning("Ingest error: %s", exc)
                result = None

            # Run SNN learning step
            step_result = self.graph.step()

steps.description: Bug A: add early-return guard before nodes_created so None result never reaches len()
Bug B: re-apply snn_config immediately after restore() so code defaults overwrite any stale checkpoint values

params.old_text:
logger.info(
                    "Restored graph from %s (%d nodes, %d synapses)",
                    self._checkpoint_path,
                    len(self.graph.nodes),
                    len(self.graph.synapses),
                )
            except Exception as exc:
                logger.warning("Failed to restore checkpoint: %s", exc)
params.new_text:
logger.info(
                    "Restored graph from %s (%d nodes, %d synapses)",
                    self._checkpoint_path,
                    len(self.graph.nodes),
                    len(self.graph.synapses),
                )
                self.graph.config.update(snn_config)
            except Exception as exc:
                logger.warning("Failed to restore checkpoint: %s", exc)

steps.description: Bug C: escalate unexpected TonicEngine init Exception to warning and clear _tonic_thread

params.old_text:
except Exception as exc:
                    logger.info("Tonic engine init error: %s — ouroboros-only mode", exc)

steps.description: Verify Bug A: Ingest error warning present exactly once in non-comment lines

params.command: python3 -c "lines=[l for l in open('Faux_Clawdbot/openclaw_hook.py') if not l.lstrip().startswith('#')]; print(sum(1 for l in lines if 'Ingest error:' in l))"

steps.description: Verify Bug A: result is None guard present exactly once
Verify Bug B: config.update(snn_config) present exactly once
Verify Bug C: logger.warning used for tonic engine init error in non-comment lines

params.command: python3 -c "lines=[l for l in open('Faux_Clawdbot/openclaw_hook.py') if not l.lstrip().startswith('#')]; print(sum(1 for l in lines if 'logger.warning' in l and 'Tonic engine init error' in l))"

steps.description: Verify openclaw_hook.py compiles cleanly after all patches
Commit and push patched openclaw_hook.py; treat already-committed as success

params.command: git -C Faux_Clawdbot config user.email 'codemine@et-systems.ai' && git -C Faux_Clawdbot config user.name 'Codemine (QB)' && git -C Faux_Clawdbot add openclaw_hook.py && git -C Faux_Clawdbot diff --cached --quiet && echo ALREADY_COMMITTED || (git -C Faux_Clawdbot commit -m 'fix(openclaw_hook): ingest error path, checkpoint config re-apply, tonic gate (#215)' && git -C Faux_Clawdbot push && echo COMMITTED)
